action_set_definitions.name: get_warehouse_map
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the warehouse layout, including distances between nodes, connectivity, and zone classifications (e.g., Freezer vs. Ambient).

action_set_definitions.name: list_robots
action_set_definitions.description: Returns a list of all active Autonomous Mobile Robot (AMR) unit IDs currently in the warehouse.

action_set_definitions.name: get_robot_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves real-time status for a specific robot, including battery percentage, current thermal exposure timer (minutes), current location, and operational status.

robot_id.description: The unique identifier of the robot.

action_set_definitions.name: move_robot
action_set_definitions.description: Commands a robot to move to a specific location. Note: Transitioning from Freezer to Ambient zones will trigger a mandatory desiccation period during which the robot is unresponsive.

robot_id.description: The unique identifier of the robot.

action_set_definitions.name: pick_up_item
action_set_definitions.description: Commands a robot to pick up a specific inventory item from its current location.

robot_id.description: The unique identifier of the robot.

item_id.description: The ID of the cargo to be picked up.

location_id.description: The location where the item is stored.

action_set_definitions.name: drop_off_item
action_set_definitions.description: Commands a robot to drop off its held item at a specific location.

robot_id.description: The unique identifier of the robot.

item_id.description: The ID of the cargo to be dropped off.

state_description.robots: List of active warehouse robots and their current physical/operational status.
state_description.tasks: List of pending and active warehouse tasks.
state_description.inventory: Mapping of location IDs to item counts.
state_description.warehouse_map: Connectivity and distance matrix between locations to simulate travel costs.
